attributes.__structure__:
ATTRS:
  description: Water table levels.
  VERSION: 0.0.0
COORDS:
  date_time:
    name: date_time
    coords:
    - date_time
    unit:
      tick: m
      tz: UTC
      dayfirst: false
      yearfirst: true
    type: datetime64[m]
    na_value: null
    description: Time coordinate
    df_col: date_time
    source_unit:
      tick: m
      tz: CET
      dayfirst: false
      yearfirst: true
    range: null
    composed:
    - date_time
    chunk_size: 1024
    step_limits:
    - 1
    - 1
    - hour
    sorted: true
  well_id:
    name: well_id
    coords:
    - well_id
    unit: null
    type: str[16]
    na_value: "\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\
      \uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF"
    description: Full borehole id.
    df_col: well_id
    source_unit: null
    range: null
    composed:
    - well_id
    chunk_size: 1
    step_limits: any_new
    sorted: []
  interval_num_from_top:
    name: interval_num_from_top
    coords:
    - interval_num_from_top
    unit: null
    type: str[16]
    na_value: "\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\
      \uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF"
    description: Index of boreholoe open interval. Indexed from top to bottom.
    df_col: interval_num_from_top
    source_unit: null
    range: null
    composed:
    - interval_num_from_top
    chunk_size: 16
    step_limits: any_new
    sorted: true
VARS:
  water_level:
    name: water_level
    coords:
    - date_time
    - well_id
    unit: meter
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Water table level, meters above see
    df_col: water_level
    source_unit: meter
    range: null
  water_depth:
    name: water_depth
    coords:
    - date_time
    - well_id
    unit: meter
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Water level depth relative to the borehole head.
    df_col: water_depth
    source_unit: meter
    range: null
  well_in_section_file:
    name: well_in_section_file
    coords:
    - well_id
    unit: null
    type: str[32]
    na_value: "\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\
      \uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\
      \uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF"
    description: Well full name (including collector).
    df_col: well_in_section_file
    source_unit: null
    range: null
  confirmed:
    name: confirmed
    coords:
    - well_id
    unit: null
    type: int32
    na_value: 0
    description: Sign of existing sheetname in file of measured data
    df_col: confirmed
    source_unit: null
    range: null
  X:
    name: X
    coords:
    - well_id
    unit: meter
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: X-coord of well.
    df_col: X
    source_unit: meter
    range: null
  Y:
    name: Y
    coords:
    - well_id
    unit: meter
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Y-coord of well.
    df_col: Y
    source_unit: meter
    range: null
  Z:
    name: Z
    coords:
    - well_id
    unit: meter
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Z-coord of well.
    df_col: Z
    source_unit: meter
    range: null
  collector:
    name: collector
    coords:
    - well_id
    unit: null
    type: str[32]
    na_value: "\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\
      \uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\
      \uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF"
    description: Name of collector.
    df_col: collector
    source_unit: null
    range: null
  interval_min:
    name: interval_min
    coords:
    - well_id
    - interval_num_from_top
    unit: meter
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Depth of interval start measured from the borehole head.
    df_col: interval_min
    source_unit: meter
    range: null
  interval_max:
    name: interval_max
    coords:
    - well_id
    - interval_num_from_top
    unit: meter
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Depth of interval stop measured from the borehole head.
    df_col: interval_max
    source_unit: meter
    range: null
